contributions.detail: Champion and Economic Buyer are the same person (Florence, CPO) with direct, repeated face time — she attended the 8 Jul call, hired the incoming PM, and owns the closing timeline.

Genuinely sole-sourced: MEDDPICC 2.0 logs 'no competition' (4 Jun), no rival is named in any call or next-step entry through 8 Jul, and the deal moved straight from selection (built on Florence's prior PwC/Zycus deployment) into BAFO/negotiation.
MEDDPICC is deep — 7 of 8 pillars confirmed (EB, champion, pain, decision process, decision criteria, paper process, competition); only metrics is partial.

Merlin for iContract core-vs-option is still unresolved and could strip ~$50K (20%) off the $250K TCV if Florence sides with Émeline's view. ► Get a firm buyer decision on Merlin scope before the final contract package goes out.

Single-threaded on Florence right now — Émeline (commercial driver) is on vacation, and Stephen Cook/Paras Sood went quiet for three weeks despite four reminders before finally joining the 8 Jul review. ► Get a second executive thread confirmed in writing before Florence goes on leave.
Vendor Selected + Commit forecast together justify scoring above the standard stage ceiling per the deal's own evidence trail (BAFO out, legal exchanging redlines, signature target set).

Continuous buyer-attended cadence through early July: BAFO sent 24 Jun, negotiation meeting 25 Jun, SoW sent 8-9 Jul, commercial call 9 Jul, demo scheduled 10 Jul — all within the last two weeks of the 13 Jul activity date.

Florence (CPO/champion) is personally driving cadence — she rescheduled reviews herself, set the signature deadline against her own vacation, and already hired the Zycus consultant who'll PM the project.

Close date has been pushed twice in ten days (13→15 Jul on 29 Jun, then 15→30 Jul on 8 Jul) — a slippage pattern. ► Lock the signature date in writing now, before Florence's ~22 Jul vacation removes her from the loop.

The formal meeting/Avoma log shows nothing in 90+ days — all the real cadence lives only in Next Step notes. ► Get these calls logged as Tasks/Events so momentum isn't invisible in the system of record.
Forward-dated milestones are concrete, not vague: demo 10 Jul, contract finalization 24 Jul, Phase 1 go-live this calendar year.
Florence already hired a senior Zycus consultant to PM the project ahead of signature — real buyer resourcing, not just intent.
Buyer drove 4 rounds of OF1 revisions, launched the supplier-creation process, and turned the BAFO around same-day — active paper-process ownership.
Merlin core-vs-option decision is still sitting with the buyer, and Stephen Cook/Paras Sood (tech validation) went silent for three weeks despite four reminders before finally engaging on 8 Jul.
Close date has slipped twice in ten days (13→15→30 Jul), and Florence's vacation starts ~22 Jul, leaving very little slack behind the 24 Jul contract-finalization target.
Single-threaded exec access: Florence is the only confirmed active stakeholder, with Émeline out and Stephen Cook/Paras Sood previously unresponsive for three weeks.
Merlin for iContract core-vs-option is unresolved and could cut ~$50K (20%) from the $250K deal if optioned out.
Mitigating: no named competitor, no RFP, and the deal is already in BAFO/legal redline stage with a specific signing plan on record.
